[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 001010011 4
2 000010010 2
3 100000110 3
4 000000000 a
5 110000110 4
6 000001000 1
7 011010011 5

01 000000000 a match 0 4

23 101000001 3
34 000010000 1

56 000001000 1 match 6
67 010000101 3
70 100001000 2

13 111100001 5
24 001010001 3
35 000010110 3
46 000000000 a match 0 4
57 000000000 a match 0 4
60 100000100 2
71 000001000 1 match 6

14 001110001 4
25 101010111 6
36 000000000 a match 0 4
47 010000100 2
50 000001000 1 match 6
61 000000100 1
72 000001000 1 match 6

04 001010001 3
15 111110011 7

37 000000100 1

73 101001000 3

05 011010011 5 match 7
